title: Presentator Global Config
description: Application-level settings stored at ~/Library/Application Support/com.presentator/config.yaml. These are user preferences independent of any specific presentation file. Missing fields fall back to their defaults, so the file may be sparse or absent.

fullscreen_on_presentation.description: Automatically enter fullscreen when switching to presentation mode. Exiting presentation mode returns to windowed mode.

pointer_linger_ms.description: Milliseconds after the last draw stroke in a group is released before the stroke group begins fading out.

pointer_stroke_width.description: Stroke width in pixels for draw strokes in presentation mode.

key_bindings.description: Key bindings per action. Each key is an action name; each value is an ordered list of binding strings. Bindings use human-readable format: optional modifiers (shift, alt, ctrl, cmd) joined by hyphens, followed by the key name. Named keys: space, esc, enter, tab, arrow-left, arrow-right, arrow-up, arrow-down.
